value.found_quote: Type `/rewind` (or `/undo`) to roll back your conversation thread to a previous stable checkout.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Rewind history with `/rewind`" feature under "Manage TUI sessions proactively," explaining that if an agent has made several successive changes that introduce build errors, the user can type `/rewind` (or `/undo`) to roll back the conversation thread to a previous stable checkpoint. This directly substantiates the claim about a Checkpoint/rewind feature allowing users to save points they can roll back to and undo agent changes. The page presents this as a current, active feature with no indication of preview or deprecation status.
